name: 糾纏型追求者（工具人反派）
description: Paul作為追求者被拒絕後惱羞成怒，聚集人馬圍堵女主並搶走助聽器，是推動男主英雄救美情節的功能性反派。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I want to pursue you. Would you give me a chance? / Paul fancies you. How dare you be this arrogant? / Give it back to me. Deaf girl. I'll take this hearing aid. When you thought it over, I'll give it back to you.
examples.context: Paul作為追求者被拒絕後惱羞成怒，聚集人馬圍堵女主並搶走助聽器，是推動男主英雄救美情節的功能性反派。
